subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Though thou hast been immersed in the sea of trials, yet praise be to God, thy hem and thy garment remain dry [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در بحر امتحان اگرچه غرق شدی ولی الحمد لله دامنت خشک است و پیرهنت
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude
